title: [Nyessem, Crystalline Cavern]
description: The way dead-ends in a bulbous cavern lined with cloudy, off-white crystalline formations that jut from the water-slick walls.  At the area's center, its surface covered by a thin grey fog, sits a pool of uncertain depth.  On one end of the room, a series of metal braziers lining the wall cast their amber light across the area, causing the crystalline formations above them to glitter.  A warped wooden bench sits at the pool's edge.
